MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.
Appearances: Philip T. Kilduf (673.0368) for plaintiff and moving party; Thomas Nordstom (no phone number provided) defendant and responding party appearing in propria persona with social worker Linda Huynes (682.1900).
